available_keys.example:
[nav]
# Keys reserved for quick-switching sessions via tmux bindings
available_keys = ["a", "b", "c", "d", "e", "f", "g", "h", "i", "j", "k", "l", "m", "n", "o", "p", "q", "r", "s", "t", "u", "v", "w", "x", "y", "z"]
available_keys.description: Defines the list of single-character keys that can be assigned to tmux sessions for rapid switching. Defaults to a-z.

show_child_processes.example:
[nav]
# Display the active command (e.g. nvim, go run) instead of just the shell
show_child_processes = true
show_child_processes.description: When enabled, the windows list TUI attempts to resolve the specific child process running in a pane, providing more context than the default shell name.
